positive: A whimsical and uplifting composition featuring a stylized bouquet of glowing bioluminescent flora and whimsical forest creatures, such as gentle glowing foxes and stylized moths, arranged in a perfect circular wreath. The aesthetic should blend Art Nouveau flowing lines with vibrant kawaii cottagecore elements. High contrast, minimalist background, utilizing deep indigo and emerald green as primary colors, accented by pops of gold leaf glow and neon pink highlights. The composition must feature clean, strong silhouettes suitable for a centered chest print on apparel. Perfect symmetry and clean edges are crucial. --ar 1:1 --v 6.0 --s 750
